members.name: AddPoint
members.signature: public int AddPoint(Vector2 position, float leftTangent, float rightTangent, int leftMode, int rightMode)
members.summary: Adds a point to the curve. For each side, if the [code]*_mode[/code] is [constant TANGENT_LINEAR], the [code]*_tangent[/code] angle (in degrees) uses the slope of the curve halfway to the adjacent point. Allows custom assignments to the [code]*_tangent[/code] angle if [code]*_mode[/code] is set to [constant TANGENT_FREE].

members.name: Bake
members.summary: Recomputes the baked cache of points for the curve.

members.name: CleanDupes
members.summary: Removes duplicate points, i.e. points that are less than 0.00001 units (engine epsilon value) away from their neighbor on the curve.

members.name: ClearPoints
members.summary: Removes all points from the curve.

members.name: GetDomainRange
members.summary: Returns the difference between [member min_domain] and [member max_domain].

members.name: GetPointLeftMode
members.summary: Returns the left [enum TangentMode] for the point at [param index].

members.name: GetPointLeftTangent
members.summary: Returns the left tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at [param index].

members.name: GetPointPosition
members.summary: Returns the curve coordinates for the point at [param index].

members.name: GetPointRightMode
members.summary: Returns the right [enum TangentMode] for the point at [param index].

members.name: GetPointRightTangent
members.summary: Returns the right tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at [param index].

members.name: GetValueRange
members.summary: Returns the difference between [member min_value] and [member max_value].

members.name: RemovePoint
members.summary: Removes the point at [param index] from the curve.

members.name: Sample
members.summary: Returns the Y value for the point that would exist at the X position [param offset] along the curve.

members.name: SampleBaked
members.summary: Returns the Y value for the point that would exist at the X position [param offset] along the curve using the baked cache. Bakes the curve's points if not already baked.

members.name: SetPointLeftMode
members.signature: public void SetPointLeftMode(int index, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the left [enum TangentMode] for the point at [param index] to [param mode].

members.name: SetPointLeftTangent
members.signature: public void SetPointLeftTangent(int index, float tangent)
members.summary: Sets the left tangent angle for the point at [param index] to [param tangent].

members.name: SetPointOffset
members.signature: public int SetPointOffset(int index, float offset)
members.summary: Assigns the horizontal position [param offset] to the point at [param index].

members.name: SetPointRightMode
members.signature: public void SetPointRightMode(int index, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the right [enum TangentMode] for the point at [param index] to [param mode].

members.name: SetPointRightTangent
members.signature: public void SetPointRightTangent(int index, float tangent)
members.summary: Sets the right tangent angle for the point at [param index] to [param tangent].

members.name: SetPointValue
members.signature: public void SetPointValue(int index, float y)
members.summary: Assigns the vertical position [param y] to the point at [param index].

members.name: BakeResolution
members.summary: The number of points to include in the baked (i.e. cached) curve data.

members.name: MaxDomain
members.summary: The maximum domain (x-coordinate) that points can have.

members.name: MaxValue
members.summary: The maximum value (y-coordinate) that points can have. Tangents can cause higher values between points.

members.name: MinDomain
members.summary: The minimum domain (x-coordinate) that points can have.

members.name: MinValue
members.summary: The minimum value (y-coordinate) that points can have. Tangents can cause lower values between points.

members.name: PointCount
members.summary: The number of points describing the curve.

rawMembers.name: point_{index}/left_mode
rawMembers.summary: The left [enum TangentMode] for the point at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. point_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: point_{index}/left_tangent
rawMembers.summary: The left tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. point_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: point_{index}/position
rawMembers.summary: The position of the point at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. point_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: point_{index}/right_mode
rawMembers.summary: The right [enum TangentMode] for the point at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. point_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: point_{index}/right_tangent
rawMembers.summary: The right tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. point_count - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: DomainChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when [member max_domain] or [member min_domain] is changed.

signals.name: RangeChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when [member max_value] or [member min_value] is changed.

values.name: TANGENT_FREE
values.summary: The tangent on this side of the point is user-defined.

values.name: TANGENT_LINEAR
values.summary: The curve calculates the tangent on this side of the point as the slope halfway towards the adjacent point.

values.name: TANGENT_MODE_COUNT
values.summary: The total number of available tangent modes.

constants.name: TANGENT_FREE
constants.summary: The tangent on this side of the point is user-defined.

constants.name: TANGENT_LINEAR
constants.summary: The curve calculates the tangent on this side of the point as the slope halfway towards the adjacent point.

constants.name: TANGENT_MODE_COUNT
constants.summary: The total number of available tangent modes.
